title: Remove ALL behavior-flag gating — implement one unconditional flow (ROADMAP Rule 12)
goal: vjeux MANDATE 2026-07-17 (ROADMAP Rule 12): this self-contained project has NO customers, so NO behavior may be env-flag-gated. Every behavior = ONE unconditional flow. Remove every process.env.FCT_* BEHAVIOR read; keep ONLY diagnostics (FCT_MP_DEBUG, FCT_DEBUG_ZCOMPOSITE, FCT_DEBUG_CLONE_FILT, FCT_FLARE_DEBUG -- print-only) and harness plumbing (FCT_FRAMES_DIR/FCT_LOCK/FCT_ISOLATION_ID/FCT_JOBS). METHOD per flag: (A) DEFAULT-ON flags -- the gate ALREADY runs them ON, so inlining the ON branch is BYTE-NEUTRAL; just delete the flag read + the dead OFF branch: FCT_CONFORM_FILL (compositor/index.ts:53), FCT_SPRITE_SIM (compositor/index.ts:1081), FCT_PANEL_RETIME (evaluator/index.ts:768), FCT_PROCMASK (evaluator/index.ts:812,834 + parser/index.ts:80). (B) DEFAULT-OFF flags -- RENDER THE FULL 65-SLUG GATE BOTH WAYS (flag off vs on), keep whichever branch is net-positive vs GUI GT as the single flow, DELETE the other branch + the flag: FCT_MOTION_PATH_EVAL (evaluator/index.ts:685), FCT_MOTION_PATH_MASK_LIFT (parser/index.ts:110), FCT_LINEAR_GRADIENT_GEN (parser/footage.ts:632), FCT_BLOOM_FLOAT (glow.ts:430). NOTE FCT_ANIMATED_VERTEX (parser/shapes.ts + parser/index.ts ~323, landed 498563f): naive-ON regresses Heart -4.41 so the ON branch is NOT correct as-is -> either finish it to net-positive then inline, OR delete the flag + its dead ON-branch and keep the decode as comments only (do NOT leave the flag). (C) PURE DEBUG TOGGLE to just delete: FCT_DISABLE_BLEND (parser/transform.ts:86). (D) PARAMETRIC knobs -- bake the decoded DEFAULT constant, delete the env read: FCT_QUAKE_FPS (earthquake.ts:264 -> 30), FCT_FLARE_* (gradient.ts / masks.ts -> decoded defaults). (E) DEAD comment refs to scrub: FCT_Z_COMPOSITE_*, FCT_PAINT_STROKE (z-composite.ts / emitter-render.ts comments). One flag per commit (Rule 3), each gate-verified net-positive/byte-neutral vs GUI GT. Commit==push each. SHARED-PRIMITIVE files (parser/index.ts, evaluator/index.ts, compositor/index.ts, footage.ts, shapes.ts) -> gate the WHOLE suite; re-render known stale-baseline phantoms (Earthquake/Leaves/Bloom/Wipes__Mask/Smear/Center_Reveal) fresh. Keep engine/test/no-hardcode.test.ts green. DO THIS AFTER concurrent Loop (parser/index.ts) + Swing (compositor/perspective) agents land, to avoid fratricide.
notes: Cross-cutting codebase-health cleanup, not a single-slug task. Blocks on parser/index.ts + compositor lanes being free. Land as a series of small per-flag commits, each gate-verified.
